## Example

```esql
ROW wkt = "POLYGON ((0 0, 4 0, 4 4, 0 4, 0 0))"
| EVAL buffered = ST_BUFFER(TO_GEOSHAPE(wkt), -1)
```

| wkt:keyword | buffered:geo_shape |
| --- | --- |
| POLYGON ((0 0, 4 0, 4 4, 0 4, 0 0)) | POLYGON ((1.0 1.0, 1.0 3.0, 3.0 3.0, 3.0 1.0, 1.0 1.0)) |
